name: esp32-matrix-tooling
description: Repo-level versioning tooling (bump/stamp/check). NOT a version source — the canonical version is the /VERSION file.

scripts.build:mcpb: cd mcp_server && npx tsc --project tsconfig.json && cd .. && node -e "require('fs').mkdirSync('release',{recursive:true})" && npx @anthropic-ai/mcpb pack mcp_server release/esp32-matrix.mcpb
